intent: Add Picture-in-Picture floating notes panel on mobile (three states: closed pill, expanded panel, fullscreen overlay) and course notes bulk export (Combined Markdown + ZIP).
reviewers: reliability (touch events, autosave coordination, portal lifecycle)
julik-frontend-races (touch/swipe gestures, autosave timers, DOM events)
appliedFixes: P0: Fixed empty fullscreen block in FloatingNotesPanel.tsx:130 — added missing `return null` to prevent panel rendering during fullscreen state
P1: Fixed CourseNotesTab.tsx:93,105 — changed `notes` to `exportableNotes` in both export function calls to exclude soft-deleted notes per R9
P2: Fixed CourseNotesTab.tsx:113 — added `console.error` in export catch block for debugging
P2: Fixed CourseNotesTab.tsx:119 — updated useCallback dependency array from `[notes, ...]` to `[exportableNotes, ...]`

findings.title: FloatingNotesPanel renders expanded panel during fullscreen state (empty if block without return)
findings.suggested_fix: Add `return null` inside the empty if block at line 130-133

findings.title: Deleted notes exported in bulk export — CourseNotesTab passes raw `notes` instead of filtered `exportableNotes`
findings.suggested_fix: Pass `exportableNotes` (which filters `!n.deleted`) to both `exportCombinedMarkdown` and `exportNotesZip` instead of raw `notes`

findings.title: CourseNotesTab test does not verify export functions receive filtered data — the deleted-notes bug was undetected
findings.suggested_fix: Add integration-style tests that mock the export functions and verify they receive notes filtered by `!n.deleted` and non-empty content. Test case: soft-deleted note with content should not appear in exported data.

findings.title: Export error handler silently drops error details — no console.error or telemetry
findings.suggested_fix: Add `console.error('Course notes export failed:', err)` in the catch block

findings.title: Missing touch/swipe gesture tests for FloatingNotesPanel — swipe-down collapse is untested
findings.suggested_fix: Add tests for touch gesture: swipe down on handle region >= 48px closes panel, swipe outside handle region does nothing, swipe < 48px does not close

findings.title: Dynamic JSZip import used instead of static import — deviation from plan recommendation
findings.suggested_fix: Replace `const JSZip = (await import('jszip')).default` with static `import JSZip from 'jszip'` at top of file, matching fileDownload.ts pattern. The code-splitting gain is marginal for an already-small module and adds first-call latency.

findings.title: Double-effect pattern for save status sync in NoteEditor — ref-based forwarding could be simplified
findings.suggested_fix: Consider using a single `useEffect` that depends on `[saveStatus]` and calls `onSaveStatusChange?.(saveStatus)` directly, or memoize the callback with `useCallback` so the ref-forwarding pattern isn't needed

findings.title: handleTouchEnd callback recreated on every swipeDelta change during touch move — minor perf concern
findings.suggested_fix: Store swipeDelta in a ref instead of state and only use state for visual transform. This avoids callback recreation on every touchmove frame.

residualRisks: Portal z-index may conflict with native YouTube/video controls on some mobile browsers (plan risk #1)
Swipe gesture may conflict with iOS Safari back gesture at screen edges (plan risk #2)
Large ZIP exports (>100 notes) may still cause brief UI jank despite requestAnimationFrame chunking (plan risk #3)
testingGaps: No integration test verifying export functions receive deleted-filtered data
No touch gesture tests for FloatingNotesPanel swipe-down behavior
No E2E test for floating panel on real mobile viewport with video content

coverage.untrackedNote: Multiple untracked files in .context/, docs/brainstorms/, docs/ideation/, docs/plans/ — none part of this review's tracked diff scope
